buildCommand: npm run build && rm -rf vercel-output && mkdir -p vercel-output && cp -R public/build vercel-output/build && find public/build/assets -maxdepth 1 -name 'app-*.css' -print -quit | xargs -I{} cp {} vercel-output/build/assets/app-DwL8tcUk.css && find public -maxdepth 1 -type f ! -name 'index.php' -exec cp {} vercel-output/ \;
